sql:
SELECT 
    TAARH.API_ID
    ,TAARH.HIST_SERIAL 
    ,TAM.API_NAME
    ,TAM.API_URL
    ,TAM.REQ_PARAM
    ,TAARH.REG_USER 
    ,TAARH.REFUSE_MSG
    ,TO_CHAR(TAARH.EXPIRD_DATE , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS EXPIRD_DATE
    ,TAARH.API_DESC 
    ,TO_CHAR(TAARH.CREATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME
    ,TO_CHAR(TAARH.UPDATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME
    ,TISM.SYSTEM_DESC 
    ,TAARH.SYSTEM_ID
    ,TISM.API_KEY
    ,COALESCE(TAM.KONG_HOST, 'HOST_'|| TAM.API_ID) as KONG_HOST
    ,TISM.API_KEY AS KONG_KEY
    , CASE WHEN TAARH.STATUS_CD = 'APPLY' THEN '신청'
        WHEN TAARH.STATUS_CD = 'GRANT' THEN '승인'
        WHEN TAARH.STATUS_CD = 'REJECT' THEN '반려'
        ELSE '회수' 
        END AS STATUS_CD
        ,CASE 
        WHEN TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'B' THEN 'Batch'
        WHEN TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD = 'F' THEN 'SFTP'
        ELSE 'OnDemand'
        END AS EXEC_MODE_CD
        ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY TO_CHAR(TAARH.CREATE_TIME , 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DESC) as RANK
        ,TISM.SYSTEM_NM
    FROM DATAHUB.TB_API_AUTH_REQ_HIST TAARH
    LEFT JOIN DATAHUB.TB_API_MST TAM ON TAARH.API_ID = TAM.API_ID
    LEFT JOIN DATAHUB.TB_INTRL_SYSTEM_MST TISM ON TAARH.SYSTEM_ID = TISM.SYSTEM_ID
    WHERE TAM.EXEC_MODE_CD != 'F'
        AND TAARH.API_ID = 38
        AND TAARH.SYSTEM_ID = 11
        AND TAARH.STATUS_CD IN
             (  
                'APPLY'
             )
